title: test: fix "run healthcheck" bindings test
body:
Fixed #27118

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *nimdrak* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign [mtrmac](https://github.com/mtrmac) for approval. For more information see [the Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

@nimdrak nice catch ... we have really odd hardware sometimes for tests; i'm wondering if we should do a backoff instead of a straight 1 second wait? i.e. `time := 500 * time.millisecond` and then `time := time + time` with a loop iteration of like 5 or 6 ?  wdyt ?
@baude Thanks for good review! How about this? 378365e
New changes are detected. LGTM label has been removed.

@Luap99 Thanks for letting me know it. I agree with you. 
But I made a mistake in squashing my commits so I make a PR again, here. https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27195/files. Please check it when you have a time 🙇  cc. @Honny1
